dataset_name: ResearchMind Gold Standard Academic Benchmark (Expanded Real-World Sample)
description: Expanded empirical benchmark dataset with real-world paper annotations across CVPR, NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR, Nature MI, IEEE Trans, ACM CHI, and Springer LNCS.

Sutskever et al. (2014) Sequence to Sequence Learning with Neural Networks

gold_claims.claim: The Transformer is the first sequence transduction model relying entirely on self-attention.
